items.name_en: 【M92649 Murakami Collaboration Limited Edition White Three-Color Mahjong Purse】
items.name_cn:
【M92649 Murakami Collaboration Limited Edition White Three-Color Mahjong Purse】
Size: 21x13x3cm.
Why choose the M92649 White Three-Color Mahjong Purse? Because I really think it's great: it's lightweight and easy to carry; it has a large capacity, fitting a phone, earphones, power bank, lipstick, wallet, compact powder, etc.; and it looks beautiful, giving a very stylish look.
A bag that is good-looking, versatile, exquisite, durable, and lightweight is a must-have for home, travel, dates, business, or any occasion. You can handle it with ease.
(M92649 White Three-Color Mahjong Purse) adds no unnecessary clutter, pursuing a design aesthetic of simplicity. The lines are smooth, and the shape is classic and generous. The details reveal a retro flavor. Simple yet not simplistic, fashionable and atmospheric while retaining delicacy and refinement, reflecting a sweet and charming retro fashion sense, tailored for you.
Murakami uses a unique fashion perspective to inject 33-color elements into every part of the bag. The classic magic is irreplaceable, and the design spirit that is hard to surpass is the secret behind everyone's madness.
Versatile for commuting, adapting to any change with one bag. The versatile color highlights your elegant temperament. The simple style is classic and atmospheric. No need for extra decoration. The understated design shows confidence.
Good-looking is just that simple.
Have an unexpected encounter with the M92649 White Three-Color Mahjong Purse,
and meet the 'you' of this moment.
Individualistic yet not ostentatious, noble yet not flashy.
A woman is like a handbag,
No matter where you are,
You are a piece of 'art'.
We,
Offer warmth to you,
Offer quality and nobility to you,
Offer temperament and elegance to you,
You are the best.

items.name_en: 【MCM Top Small Pillow Bag】MCM Aren Visetos Small Boston Bag
items.name_cn:
【MCM Top Small Pillow Bag】MCM Aren Visetos Small Boston Bag
This Aren Boston bag offers a new interpretation of a classic shape, paying tribute to MCM's roots in travel.
Its silhouette evokes a weekend travel bag, featuring clean lines and a convenient extended zipper. The exquisite craftsmanship features a hand-wrapped, hand-stitched, and edge-painted top handle.
Dimensions: 23*11*15cm
Strap: 102-118cm Removable/Adjustable

items.name_cn:
【Nano Diane Bag】M14194 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
The Nano Diane in two-tone Monogram Empreinte HlLt leather is a miniature version of the iconic Diane bag. This meticulously crafted piece features all the key details of the original design, including a round flap, piped edges, and a strap-style magnetic closure. Its detachable handle and detachable adjustable shoulder strap offer different carrying options.
Size: 19 x 10.5 x 6 cm

items.name_cn:
【New Pink Tiger ❤ Large】
Dior book tote shopping bag
Inspired by the Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship product that embodies Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily items, featuring a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more fashionable look. The front is adorned with a "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 42×35×18.5cm

items.name_cn:
【New】Gucci Blondie Mini Shoulder
The new Gucci Blondie handbag features the brand's classic series logo, which first appeared in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This mini shoulder bag is crafted from glossy leather and features an adjustable leather shoulder strap for crossbody wear. Black glossy leather, brown cotton-linen blend lining, circular interlocking double G, adjustable shoulder strap (47-57 cm height); length adjustable between 110 cm and 130 cm, zip closure, weight: approx. 350g, fits iPhone Max/Plus, AirPods, long wallet and lipstick.
Model: 820429.
Size: 21 (W) x 15.5 (H) x 8cm (D)
Color: Burgundy full leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
